$schema_note: Verbatim contracts registered for plan-time spec/test wording-drift check. Each entry asserts that `phrase` appears as a literal substring within `section` of `spec_path` (relative to skill root). The meta-test at tests/unit/test_contracts_meta.py reads this file and verifies each entry; if a contract is silently changed in either spec or test, CI catches it (Item D — test ↔ spec wording drift).

contracts.phrase:
two consecutive

contracts.phrase:
run_dir = `~/.claude/channels/assemble/runs/<rid>/`. Four artifacts:

- `SCOPE.md` — allow-list + deny-list + completion criterion + task breakdown (Step 2).
- `test_first.sh` — exits non-zero before implementation (red). Step 3.
- `verify.sh` — exits 0 after implementation (green). Step 5.
- `IMPL_REPORT.md` — 7 sections filled across Steps 2–7. `status: complete` when done.
contracts.tag: Spike V.1 — builder 4-artifact existence invariant (SCOPE/test_first/verify/IMPL_REPORT)

contracts.phrase:
`parse_scope_step1.md`, `diff_collect_step2.md`,
  `classify_files_step3.md`, `rule3_check_step4.md`,
  `severity_assess_step5.md`, `reviewer_report_step6.md`
contracts.tag: Spike VI — reviewer 6-file subagent allowlist contract

contracts.phrase:
run_dir = `~/.claude/channels/assemble/runs/<rid>/`. One primary artifact:

- `REVIEW_REPORT.md` — 7 canonical sections (Summary, Scope baseline, Diff inventory, Allow/Deny classification, Surgical Changes audit, Severity assessment, Recommendations) with verdict line in Section 1.
contracts.tag: Spike VI — reviewer REVIEW_REPORT.md 7-section invariant

contracts.phrase:
verdict = "merge-ready" if (
    classification.summary.deny_violation == 0
    AND classification.summary.allow_miss == 0
    AND rule3_audit.summary.critical == 0
) else "needs-fix"
contracts.tag: Spike VI — reviewer deterministic verdict rule

contracts.phrase: Prompt migration: `runs/{{RUN_ID}}/X` → `{{RUN_DIR}}/X`** across 32 occurrences
contracts.tag: Spike VII Track A — bundle prompts must use {{RUN_DIR}}/ absolute paths, never runs/{{RUN_ID}}/

contracts.phrase:
`verifier_extract_step1.md` — parsed_scope.json → extracted_completion.json
- `verifier_execute_step2.md` — bash execution + capture (Bash tool GRANTED for this step ONLY)
- `verifier_classify_step3.md` — execution_result.json → verify_result.json (deterministic verdict)
- `verifier_report_step4.md` — VERIFY_REPORT.md render from 3 prior JSONs + template
contracts.tag: Spike VIII — verifier 4-file subagent allowlist contract (Bash tool granted to step2 only)

contracts.phrase:
verdict = "pass" if (
    execution_result.exit_code == 0
    AND not execution_result.skipped
    AND not execution_result.timed_out
) else "fail"
contracts.tag: Spike VIII — verifier deterministic verdict rule (exit_code == 0, not skipped, not timed_out)

contracts.phrase: `VERIFY_REPORT.md` — 7 canonical sections (Summary, Completion command, Execution result, Stdout sample, Stderr sample, Verdict reasoning, Recommendations) with verdict line in Section 1.
contracts.tag: Spike VIII — verifier VERIFY_REPORT.md 7-section schema lock for downstream consumers

contracts.phrase:
`shipper_preflight_step1.md` — preflight.json (Bash GRANTED for read-only git probes via `server.git_helpers`)
- `shipper_version_step2.md` — version_bump.json (Edit-only — NO Bash)
- `shipper_build_step3.md` — build_result.json (Bash GRANTED for single build invocation, 300s timeout)
- `shipper_tag_step4.md` — tag_result.json + SHIP_REPORT.md (Bash GRANTED, narrowly scoped to `git tag` + `git rev-parse <tag>`)
contracts.tag: Spike IX — shipper 4-file subagent allowlist contract (Bash granted to Steps 1, 3, 4; Step 2 Edit-only)

contracts.phrase:
verdict = "ship-ready" if (
    preflight.verdict == "pass"
    AND version_bump.new_version is not None
    AND (build_result.exit_code == 0 OR build_result.skipped == True)
    AND tag_sha is not None
) else "blocked"
contracts.tag: Spike IX — shipper deterministic verdict rule (preflight pass AND version bumped AND build ok/skipped AND tag created)

contracts.phrase: `SHIP_REPORT.md` — 7 canonical sections on happy path (Summary, Pre-flight, Version bump, Build artifact, Tag, Verdict reasoning, Hand-off). Abort variant uses 4 sections (1, 2, 6, 7) when pre-flight fails.
contracts.tag: Spike IX — shipper SHIP_REPORT.md 7-section happy-path / 4-section abort schema lock

contracts.phrase:
- `keeper_audit_step1.md` — Bash GRANTED for read-only git probes
- `keeper_extract_step2.md` — Bash GRANTED for canned `python3 .../extract_rules.py <run_dir>` invocation
- `keeper_summarize_step3.md` — NO Bash
- `keeper_ledger_step4.md` — Bash GRANTED for canned `python3 .../ledger_update.py <run_dir>` invocation
contracts.tag: Spike X — keeper allowlist invariant (4 sub-agent prompts)

contracts.phrase:
verdict = "audit-clean" if (
    audit_inventory.verdict == "audit-ready"
    AND total_learnings_emitted == 0
) else "audit-flagged" if (
    audit_inventory.verdict == "audit-ready"
    AND total_learnings_emitted >= 1
) else "audit-skipped"
contracts.tag: Spike X — keeper 3-outcome verdict invariant (audit-clean / audit-flagged / audit-skipped)

contracts.phrase:
- `<run_dir>/audit_inventory.json` — Step 1 output
- `<run_dir>/learning_candidates.json` — Step 2 output (deterministic rule extractor)
- `<run_dir>/learnings_to_emit.json` — Step 3 output (LLM-summarized)
- `<run_dir>/KEEPER_REPORT.md` — Step 4 output (7 sections happy / 4 abort)
contracts.tag: Spike X — keeper artifact schema invariant (KEEPER_REPORT.md sections + 3 audit JSONs)
